name: Nordic Countries

phone.notes: Nordic documents often contain IKEA codes, order numbers, and price formats that look like phones.

nationalId.description: Danish CPR or similar Nordic personal ID
nationalId.notes: Format: DDMMYY-XXXX. US SSN pattern (XXX-XX-XXXX) is likely a false positive in Nordic context.

notes: Conservative detection to avoid false positives from transactional documents.
